Balance: 0

How to migrate CATPAY token

  • 1. Please connect your wallet
  • 2. After connecting, the dapp will detect your v1 token balance
  • 3. Click "Approve", then sign the wallet txn to approve the migration app
  • 4. Click "Migrate" to migrate all v1 tokens to v2 tokens
  • 5. Wait until all dapp processes are complete
  • 6. Copy the v2 contract address, and import this to your wallet
  • 7.You will receive the new tokens within your wallet, there should be 1/10,000 the amount of the original tokens
